title: cymbopogon ruprechtii
intro: Cymbopogon ruprechtii, also known as Korean lemongrass or Korean citronella grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. The health benefits of Cymbopogon ruprechtii include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, teas, and infusions that can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
